name: infa-cav-mcp-server
title: Informatica Cloud Address Verification MCP Server
summary: Informatica's MCP server providing data quality assurance tools for AI agents to validate, standardize, and enrich global addresses in real-time
description: Informatica's MCP server providing data quality assurance tools for AI agents to validate, standardize, and enrich global addresses in real-time

useCases.name: Validate Real-Time Input
useCases.description: Verify and standardize physical addresses instantly during customer onboarding or data entry workflows.

useCases.name: Convert Incomplete Strings
useCases.description: Transform messy or fragmented address inputs into clean, professional postal formats.

useCases.name: Standardize Global Formats
useCases.description: Automatically apply correct international postal rules for country-specific formatting (e.g., ZIP codes, provinces).

idmcOauth.description: Authenticate with Informatica OAuth2 authorization server. The client credential flow is intended for Machine to Machine communication and there is no separate Authorization URL required. The same token url can be used for both first time token generation and refreshing token.
